items.title: Unsplash
items.description: Tons of high quality photos and illustrations that are freely available for use.

items.title: Pexels
items.description: Another great source for free stock photos and videos with a wide variety of content.

items.title: Tabler Icons
items.description: An awesome collection of open source SVG icons that I use throughout my projects for their clean and consistent design. They are featured heavily throughout this site.

items.title: Dashboard Icons
items.description: This is a must have resource for any self-hosting enthusiast. It provides a comprehensive collection of logos for popular self-hosted applications, making it easy to create a cohesive and visually appealing dashboard.
